description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is primarily orange with two broad white horizontal stripes encircling its midsection, which are likely intended to be reflective for visibility. The surface shows signs of wear, including dirt, scuff marks, and some faded or peeling areas, especially on the white stripes. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the cone. The base appears to be made of a thicker, possibly weighted rubber material, and is visibly dirty and slightly deformed from use. There are no visible logos, but some black marks and residue are present, indicating heavy use in an outdoor urban environment.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two wide white stripes and a dirty, sturdy square base. The cone shows visible signs of use, including scuffs and faded areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white stripes and a dirty, slightly warped square base.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the cone's right side, with visible scuff marks and a cleaner appearance on the stripes.
description_view_2: The left side view reveals more pronounced black marks and peeling on the upper white stripe.
description_view_3: Rear view with the most visible wear, including significant peeling and dirt on the white stripe and base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide white horizontal stripes encircle the cone, positioned at the upper and midsection. The stripes are approximately equal in width and intended to be reflective.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or holes.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, thick, and made of heavy rubber, providing stability. It is visibly dirty, slightly deformed, and has a textured, grippy surface.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos or text are visible, but there are black marks and residue on the surface.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuffs, fading, peeling, and deformation, indicating heavy outdoor use.
